email_address.description: Customer email. Lowercased. No 'mailto:' prefix and no surrounding angle brackets.

phone_number.description: Customer phone number in E.164 format when country code is known (e.g. '+14045551234'). Otherwise digits only with no spaces, dashes, or parentheses.

date_of_birth.description: Customer date of birth in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. '1984-11-29'). Return null if the value is missing, '#ERROR!', a range, or cannot be parsed into a single calendar date.

occasion.description: The occasion for the ride. Must be EXACTLY one of the enum values (case-sensitive). Map common synonyms before defaulting to 'Other': airport pickup/drop or flight -> 'Airport Transfer'; bday -> 'Birthday'; concert/festival/show -> 'Concert/Festival'; film shoot/TV shoot/crew transport -> 'Production'; game/sporting event/match (non-FIFA) -> 'Sports Events'; sightseeing -> 'Tour'; World Cup or FIFA match -> 'FIFA'. Use 'Other' only when an occasion is mentioned but does not match. Use null only when no occasion is mentioned at all.

number_of_passengers.description: Total number of passengers as a single integer >= 1. Return null if the value is a range (e.g. '4-6'), a non-numeric description, or not stated.

date_of_service.description: Date the ride is scheduled for, in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. '2026-04-25'). Return null if the value is missing, '#ERROR!', a date range (e.g. 'May 8th to 10th'), a relative reference that cannot be resolved (e.g. 'next Friday'), or cannot be parsed into a single calendar date.

pickup_time.description: Pick-up time in 24-hour HH:MM format. Examples: '7:00 PM' -> '19:00', '6:30 AM' -> '06:30', 'noon' -> '12:00', 'midnight' -> '00:00'. Return null if the value is a time range or cannot be parsed into a single time.

drop_off_time.description: Drop-off / return time in 24-hour HH:MM format. Examples: '2:00 AM' -> '02:00', '11:10 PM' -> '23:10'. Return null if the value is a time range or cannot be parsed into a single time.

pickup_address.description: Street number and street name ONLY for the pick-up location (e.g. '445 Hopkins Street Southwest'). Do NOT include apartment/suite, city, state, or ZIP — those go in their own fields.

apartment_suite.description: Apartment number, suite, unit, or building name for the pick-up address (e.g. 'Apt 4B', 'Scout Living'). Null if not present.

state_province.description: State or province of the pick-up address. Use the full name when given that way (e.g. 'Georgia', not 'GA'). Otherwise preserve as written.

zip_postal_code.description: ZIP or postal code as a string. Preserve leading zeros (e.g. '03012', not 3012).

destination_address_or_stops.description: Destination address or any requested intermediate stops. If multiple stops are listed, join them with ' | ' in the order requested (e.g. 'Stop A | Stop B | Stop C').

final_drop_off_address.description: Final drop-off address at the end of the trip. For round trips this is often the same as the pickup address.

how_did_you_hear_about_us.description: Referral source as written by the customer (e.g. 'Google', 'Instagram', 'Worked with prior'). Null if not present.

date_of_form_submission.description: Date the form was submitted, in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

time_of_form_submission.description: Time the form was submitted in 24-hour HH:MM:SS. Append timezone offset when present (e.g. '6:46:51 pm, GMT-0500' -> '18:46:51-05:00').
